expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Several horizontally scrollable sections are clipped at the right edge. The top category tab shows only part of “Hot Ga…”, and the game rows show partially cut-off cards in the third column.
The bottom navigation appears to highlight “POKER” as the active section, while the visible page content is casino/home game content.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game cards, partially hiding content at the bottom of the screen.
Some labels on partially visible cards, such as “EXCLUSIVE,” are cut off at the edge, making the section look unfinished.

expected.reasoning: Issue 1 directly describes the bottom navigation highlighting 'POKER' while the actual page content is different, matching the expected defect of wrong Poker item being highlighted in bottom nav.
